Options are 3 values. Nearest text is 'Officer', 'Officer or enlisted', 'Not Applicable'. This asks whether the service member was an officer or enlisted. 'Guard' is a nearby text fragment from the branch-of-service section that was incorrectly assigned.

corrections.currentLabel: Were you discharged from this instance of U.S. military service, to include Reserves, or National Guard?
corrections.newLabel: Provide the type of discharge you received
corrections.reason: Options are 6 values mapping to discharge types. Nearest text shows 'General', 'Honorable Conditions', 'Dishonorable', and 'Provide the type of discharge you received:' is a candidate. Current label is the YES/NO discharge question (RadioButtonList[4]), not the discharge type selector. The YES/NO question is already correctly labeled on RadioButtonList[4].

corrections.reason: Options are 7 values. Nearest text shows 'Coast Guard', 'Air Force', 'Guard' — these are military branches, not discharge reasons.
